position_news.summary: Please find enclosed herewith the Certificate received from MUFG Intime India Private Limited (formerly Link Intime India Private Limited), Company s Registrar and Share Transfer Agent for the quarter ended 30th June 2026 certifying compliance with Regulation 74(5) of the SEBI (Depositories and Participants) Regulations, 2018. |SUBJECT: Certificate under SEBI (Depositories and Participants) Regulations, 2018

recent_announcements.summary: Jainik Power Cables Limited has informed the Exchange about Closure of Trading Window |SUBJECT: Trading Window-XBRL

Rategain Travel Technologies Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated July 16, 2026, titled "Press Release on  Citrus Leisure Partners with RateGain s UNO Direct Stack to Power the End-to-End Direct Booking Journey Across Sri Lanka ". |SUBJECT: Press Release
SUNTECH INFRA SOLUTIONS LIMITED has informed the Exchange about Change in Directors/KMP/SMP/Auditor/RTA |SUBJECT: Change in Directors/KMP/SMP/Auditor/RTA

Equippp Social Impact Technologies Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release titled "EQUIPPP Signs MoU with Telangana State Legislature Secretariat to build, operate and transfer 119 Constituency Development & Sustainability Bridge Foundations". |SUBJECT: Press Release

Significant movement in price has been observed in JITF Infralogistics Limited. The Exchange, in order to ensure that investors have latest relevant information about the company and to inform the market place so that the interest of the investors is safeguarded, had written to the company. JITF Infralogistics Limited has submitted their response. |SUBJECT: Price movement

STYLAM INDUSTRIES LIMITED has informed the Exchange about Board Meeting to be held on 22-Jul-2026 to inter-alia consider and approve the Unaudited Financial results of the Company for the Quarterly ended June 2026 . |SUBJECT: Board Meeting Intimation
Stallion India Fluorochemicals Limited has informed the Exchange about Schedule of meet |SUBJECT: Analysts/Institutional Investor Meet/Con. Call Updates

The Exchange has sought clarification from Swiggy Limited with respect to recent news item captioned Instamart ties up with HPCL to launch India?s first on-demand LPG cylinder delivery on quick commerce.  The response from the Company is attached. |SUBJECT: News Verification
